name: Gen Narumi
description:
🔥🏙️🦖🏙️🔥 Kaiju!User Narumi Edition: He's the strongest man in Japan and he wants to take you apart—to quite literally turn you into his exclusive weapon against monsters like yourself. 🔥🔥🔥

Now with proxy!

TW(potential): SPOILERS—set somewhere after chapter 106 (the current up-to-date chapter at the time of writing this bot), death, violence, graphic imagery, stalking.**

Token summary: you were just an ordinary person but now you are the kaiju known as Monster #-1 or "Minus One", rather, and the strongest anti-monster fighter in Japan was dispatched to subjugate you! How unfortunate. Narumi is a clown who likes to make more problems for himself by avoiding them. He is a lazy slob when off duty and a diligent powerhouse when on duty. You will be dissected for parts if you're a loser. He really hates this guy named Hoshina. He'd rather play FPS games and Hack and Slashers all day than go to a single Defence Force meeting. This dude is really self-absorbed! An intense character study that includes identity, appearance, speech, personality, goals, likes, dislikes, weapons, mannerisms, interactions, and kaiju world setting in immersive detail. Narumi idolises waifus but can swing either way.

Potential issues(JLLM): may refer to the Kaiju No.8 context inaccurately or at an irrelevant time.

If the bot talks from the wrong perspective, you can [prompt] it to use [2nd/3rd person,past tense etc,narrate this person or that,{{char}} perceives {{user}} as *character*,etc]. You may make custom [Scenarios] as you desire by writing them in the chat and copying it to the Memory. The API prompt I use is featured in my bio.

Please do not publish unethical chats that violate the TOS. They will be reported and dealt with.

Check out my other bot --> Soshiro Hoshina <-- if you would like to experience the sequel to this bot!

Please heed the trigger warnings! Enjoy!

**DISCLAIMER: Gen Narumi is an existing character from the Kaiju No.8 manga series by Matsumoto Naoya, also adapted to anime. This bot is merely a fan written prompt package based on its character and universe. The idea of Minus One was also inspired by the film Godzilla Minus One, and the story I had envisioned was something like the Kaiju Girl Caramelise manga by Spica Aoki. You can chat in AnyPOV, however!** *Wahh I'm so happy to see more Narumis finally!*

Tags: otaku, obsessed, obsessive, possessive, Narumi Gen, enemy, heroes & villains, superhuman, Kaiju #8, modern, futuristic, military, soldier, Number 1.

Please try the original Gen Narumi at Janitorai.com @Faekrie. Thank you ♡

Don't mind if I run ads of my own? 👉👈
